title: Mel's Vanilla+
description: A simple mod that adds vanilla-friendly features.
body:
---

![Yuh](https://cdn-raw.modrinth.com/data/3BhcWEDV/images/ee78f88a51dabc69e05c4276f7200c6e7a42922e.png 'Mod Title')

---

Mel's Vanilla+ is a simple mod that aims to add vanilla-friendly features. From Copper Tools and Shulker Shell Helmets to Bookshelf and Brick variety, Mel's Vanilla+ offers a range of simple additional blocks to help with building, that fit with the vanilla style, as well as a few pieces of equipment to help you explore!

While simple, Mel's Vanilla+ adds unique features such as Special Bookshelves which can be emptied for decoration or Rainbow Bookshelves which provide double enchanting power, Cracked and Mossy Bricks help liven up your buildings much more and Chiseled Mud Bricks allow you to preserve your froggy friends in the builds around you for evermore. Purpur can now be polished and chiseled and Snow can be crafted into Snow Bricks. Copper and Gold Bars to help decorate where vanilla Iron Bars just dont quite cut it, Glass Doors and Barred Doors make the perfect alternatives to regular Iron Doors and Shulker Shell Helmets stop you levitating making End City exploration a lot more manageable as well as many more features.

---

**Watch an overview of all the current features [here.](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=Pqt42M3x8RU)**
<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/Pqt42M3x8RU" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

---

Mel's Vanilla+ is the perfect mod for anyone looking for new but simple features that fit well with the vanilla style and gameplay.
